[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: Overview: A dark, rounded UI profile screen shows a name at the top, an avatar on the left, and two colored status boxes in the center-right.

Main Subject: The main focus is a user profile interface featuring the large text “Farizz” near the top center, a small username line beneath it, an avatar circle on the left, and two rounded rectangular panels in the middle displaying “Unlimited” and “Lv 1.”

Setting: The image is a digital interface on a dark navy background with soft, circular bokeh-like shapes; it appears to be an app or web profile system screen, with no real-world setting visible.

Visual Details: The background is a deep blue with faint, semi-transparent circles of varying sizes. A large rounded rectangle frame spans most of the screen, with thin light borders. “Farizz” is in large white text at the upper center, with a smaller gray text line below it. A pill-shaped badge labeled “OWNER” appears below the username line in a muted gold/olive tone. On the left side inside the frame, there is a circular profile image with a yellow border; the contents of the avatar are small and unclear but include a stylized illustrated scene. In the center-right area, there are two horizontally aligned rounded boxes: the left box has a red outline and contains a small icon and the text “Unlimited” with smaller text above that reads “LIMIT”; the right box has a teal/green outline with an icon and the text “Lv 1,” with smaller text above that reads “LEVEL GRUP.” At the bottom center, there is faint gray text.

Visible Text: Farizz
@6281269817421

Hutao Assister [1] · Premium Profile System

Practical Summary: The image shows a dark-themed profile UI with a name and handle at the top, an owner badge, and two status panels. It also includes an avatar thumbnail on the left and faint system text along the bottom.
